html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Brightshade Armor is a craftable chest slot Armor exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be crafted while next to the Brightsmithy, requiring 4 Pure Brilliance and 4 Brightshade Husks to craft.

The Brightshade Armor has a Durability of 830. It absorbs 80% of received physical damage and 10 flat received Planar Damage.

An extra 10% protection is added after the initial 80% (total 82%) to physical protection from Lunar Aligned creatures. When combined with the Brightshade Helm, the total physical damage protection against Lunar Aligned creatures increases to 85%, as the extra protection added after the initial 80% becomes 25% instead of 10%.

Additionally, 10% Planar Protection is added before the flat Planar Defense against Lunar Aligned creatures. When combined with the Brightshade Helm, this bonus becomes 25%. This manner of protection is much more effective than the physical damage counterpart.

Whenever a character wearing Brightshade Armor is attacked, it deals 10 Planar Damage back to the attacker and pacifies Gestalts. This damage is doubled to 20 against Shadow Aligned creatures.

When the Brightshade Armor's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one Brightshade Repair Kit.

Contents

  • 1 Usage
  • 2 Skill Tree
    • 2.1 Lunar Swindler
  • 3 Skins
  • 4 Assets

Skill Tree

Lunar Swindler

If Wortox has the Lunar Swindler skill, while a Soul Echo is active, Wortox will ignore one hit of damage when wearing a Brightshade Helm or Brightshade Armor, identical to the effects of Bone Armor. This consumes the active Soul Echo.

Lunar Guardian I

If the wearer is Wormwood with the Lunar Guardian I Skill, being attacked causes the attacker to take an additional 10 damage and become imprisoned in roots for 6 seconds.

“This armor doesn't leaf any room for improvement.”
–Wilson
“I make it look good.”
–Willow
“Tough, like Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“Shining armor, but no knight to save us.”
–Wendy
“THE DEAD HUSK OF MY ENEMY IS AN EXCELLENT DAMAGE BUFFER”
–WX-78
“Surprisingly effective plant-based armor.”
–Wickerbottom
“Sturdy organic armor.”
–Woodie
“Does no one else find this armor oddly itchy?”
–Maxwell
“Armör crafted fröm a fallen föe.”
–Wigfrid
“We're gonna look so tough!”
–Webber
“A hard outer crust.”
–Warly
“Mean friend made nice clothes”
–Wormwood
“Built to last!”
–Winona
“Strong and light, quite good in a fight.”
–Wortox
“Tough and glowy!”
–Wurt
“It makes me feel so safe, it's scary!”
–Walter
“Some extra protection is always welcome.”
–Wanda

When combined with the Brightshade Helm, the total physical damage protection against Lunar Aligned creatures increases to 85%, as the extra protection added after the initial 80% becomes 25% instead of 10%.
Additionally, 10% Planar Protection is added before the flat Planar Defense against Lunar Aligned creatures. When combined with the Brightshade Helm, this bonus becomes 25%. This manner of protection is much more effective than the physical damage counterpart.
Whenever a character wearing Brightshade Armor is attacked, it deals 10 Planar Damage back to the attacker and pacifies Gestalts. This damage is doubled to 20 against Shadow Aligned creatures.
